Shop internet plans for business

The 100% direct fibre difference

Experience Canada’s #1 internet technology for speed and reliability with TELUS PureFibre. Our 100% fibre optic connection1 delivers lightning-fast internet directly to your home. Enjoy a continuous connection, even at peak times or when several devices are connected at the same time.

The 100% direct fibre difference

Experience Canada’s #1 internet technology for speed and reliability with TELUS PureFibre. Our 100% fibre optic connection1 delivers lightning-fast internet directly to your home. Enjoy a continuous connection, even at peak times or when several devices are connected at the same time.

Discover the benefits of a direct connection

With us, you have a 100% fibre network to your home, unlike Hybrid Fibre Coax that uses coaxial cables throughout your neighbourhood. TELUS PureFibre delivers internet at the speed of light, ensuring you get consistent, high-performance connections without slowdowns or interference.

Symmetrical download and upload speeds

A 100% fibre connection delivers the same speeds for uploads as downloads.2 Other providers do not offer symmetrical speeds. Our entry-level tiers beat even their fastest upload speeds.
Download speed
measures how fast you “get” data from the internet.
Good for:
  • Browsing websites
  • Streaming music
  • Streaming video
Upload speed
measures how fast you “give” data to the internet.
Good for:
  • Video conferencing
  • Sending large files
  • Online gaming

Symmetrical download and upload speeds

A 100% fibre connection delivers the same speeds for uploads as downloads.2 Other providers do not offer symmetrical speeds. Our entry-level tiers beat even their fastest upload speeds.
Download speed
measures how fast you “get” data from the internet.
Good for:
  • Browsing websites
  • Streaming music
  • Streaming video
Upload speed
measures how fast you “give” data to the internet.
Good for:
  • Video conferencing
  • Sending large files
  • Online gaming

Symmetrical download and upload speeds

A 100% fibre connection delivers the same speeds for uploads as downloads.2 Other providers do not offer symmetrical speeds. Our entry-level tiers beat even their fastest upload speeds.
Download speed
measures how fast you “get” data from the internet.
Good for:
  • Browsing websites
  • Streaming music
  • Streaming video
Upload speed
measures how fast you “give” data to the internet.
Good for:
  • Video conferencing
  • Sending large files
  • Online gaming

Incredible Internet speeds

Get the internet experience you deserve.

Speeds of up to 5 Gigabit

Take advantage of the fastest speeds available in Western Canada3. Enjoy great video calls, games, and streaming videos in beautiful 4K - all at the same time - when everyone is online.

Consistent speeds, all day

The days of using slow, outdated cable internet are gone. TELUS delivers 100% fibre, directly to your home.

Introducing PureFibre 5 Gig - live your online life without limits

We’re rolling out unrivaled speed on our PureFibre network, the fastest internet available in Western Canada3 from only $135/mo. on a 2-year term (reg. $165/mo.).4 PureFibre 5 Gigabit is here.
Discover PureFibre 5 Gigabit
Wi-FI Technology

Choose PureFibre Internet for cutting-edge Wi-Fi performance

Experience our latest Wi-Fi technology with select higher speed plans. Our advanced Wi-Fi solutions work seamlessly across multiple frequency bands, offering improved performance over previous generations. Enjoy the benefits of reduced network congestion, faster speeds, lower latency, and increased capacity for all your connected devices.
